description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine dc2dat_2, and is implemented by a call to dc2dat_2. Use this API to return real two-terminal dc line quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = dc2dat(n, ibus, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the dc line quantity desired. (input).

string.description: dc line current in amps (Line Quantity).
dc line resistance in ohms (Line Quantity).
Current (amps) or power (MW) demand (Line Quantity).
Scheduled compounded dc voltage in kV (Line Quantity).
Mode switch dc voltage in kV (Line Quantity).
Compounding resistance in ohms (Line Quantity).
Margin in pu of desired dc power or current (Line Quantity).
Minimum compounded dc voltage in kV (Line Quantity).
Apparent active power flow into the dc line in MW (Converter Quantity).
Same as ‘PAC’ in units determined by the power output option setting (Converter Quantity).
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line in Mvar (Converter Quantity).
Same as ‘QAC’ in units determined by the power output option setting (Converter Quantity).
Apparent ac flow into the dc line in MVA (Converter Quantity).
Same as ‘MVA’ in units determined by the power output option setting (Converter Quantity).
ac current flow into the dc line in amps (Converter Quantity).
ac current flow into the dc line in pu (Converter Quantity).
dc voltage in kV (Converter Quantity).
Converter angle in degrees (Converter Quantity).
Minimum steady-state converter angle in degrees (Converter Quantity).
Nominal maximum converter angle in degrees (Converter Quantity).
Commutating transformer resistance per bridge in ohms (Converter Quantity).
Commutating transformer reactance per bridge in ohms (Converter Quantity).
Primary base ac voltage in kV (Converter Quantity).
Transformer ratio in pu (Converter Quantity).
Tap setting in pu (Converter Quantity).
Maximum tap setting in pu (Converter Quantity).
Minimum tap setting in pu (Converter Quantity).
Tap step in pu (Converter Quantity).
Commutating capacitor reactance magnitude per bridge in ohms (Converter Quantity).

error_codes.description: Bus not a converter bus of dc line ‘N’; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
No base kV at bus; ‘RVAL’ returned as the per unit current.
